title: Salary + Gig Income (Freelance) → ITR-4, New Regime

inputs.summary: AIS showing freelance receipts ₹3,20,000 and FD interest ₹18,000
26AS confirming TDS ₹28,600 from employer and ₹1,800 TDS on FD

decisions.explanation: Taxpayer has salary income + presumptive business income (44AD on freelance receipts of ₹3.2L). Total income ≤ ₹50L. No capital gains, no foreign assets, not a director. ITR-4 is valid.
New Regime is default. Taxpayer's deductions under Old Regime (80C: ₹40,000, 80D: ₹12,000) do not exceed the tax saving from New Regime's lower slabs. New Regime produces lower tax liability.
₹28,600 from employer (verified in 26AS) + ₹1,800 bank TDS on FD (verified in 26AS). No mismatches found.
Tax liability under New Regime: ₹Nil (taxable income after std deduction ≤ basic exemption? Recompute.) minus TDS of ₹30,400. See explanation.md for full computation.

validations.notes: Form 16 TDS ₹28,600 matches 26AS Part A for BNGE12345A.
All AIS entries (salary, freelance, FD interest) included in return.
Refund bank account pre-validated on IT Portal.

notes: Template case for salary + gig income scenario. Numbers are illustrative. Replace with actual figures from real filing.
